package rulefixtures

// scenario for repeated_slice_clone_in_loop: slices.Clone(...) or similar whole-slice cloning observed inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule362NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario362Negative(records []Rule362NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
